tests.test_name: pytest - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that a single pytest test file produces valid, complete documentation output for a Product Owner.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system generates visible output after processing a single test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data
At least one test entry is produced from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by a name

tests.test_name: pytest - PO - parametrize expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven pytest file with multiple parameter sets is expanded into a separate test entry for each row when documented for a Product Owner.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system generates visible output after processing a data-driven test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data
Each parameter set results in its own test entry, confirming expansion behavior

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test entry is identifiable by a name

tests.test_name: pytest - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that a single pytest test file produces documentation including a populated coverage matrix when viewed by a QA Manager.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system generates visible output after processing a single test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data
At least one test entry is produced from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by a name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry for the first test

tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven pytest file is collapsed into a single test entry for a QA Manager, with the coverage matrix reflecting each parameter row using the correct schema.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system generates visible output after processing a data-driven test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data
All parameter sets are collapsed into a single test entry rather than expanded

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test entry is identifiable by a name

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The number of rows in the coverage matrix equals the number of data-driven parameter sets

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for generic
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row conforms to the expected structure for generic test documentation
